creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to George Mitchell from comment #261)

Note: The type of vmcore.* that is being generated
does not have enough information for me to get
backtraces (no threads identified by kgdv, so no
thread stacks identified either).

So your publishing here the likes of:

core.txt.9
core.txt.0

gives me important information.
